name: icmarkets-scalping-bot
description: Forex scalping bot — IC Markets cTrader Open API

scripts.backtest:gold: TRADING_PAIRS=XAU_USD STRATEGY_MODE=ny_asian_continuation SESSION_WINDOW_MODE=all_windows NY_ASIAN_MIN_BREAK_PIPS=100 NY_ASIAN_ENTRY_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_STOP_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_MIN_RISK_PIPS=200 NY_ASIAN_MAX_RISK_PIPS=2000 NY_ASIAN_RR_RATIO=3.0 NY_ASIAN_REQUIRE_H1_ALIGNMENT=false NY_ASIAN_PREFER_AFTER_UTC=12.5 BACKTEST_SPREAD_PIPS=40 BACKTEST_SLIPPAGE_PIPS=5 node backtest-multi.js
scripts.backtest:gold:report: npm run backtest:gold && node generate-report-data.js && node build-report.cjs
scripts.backtest:all: npm run backtest:ny && cp trades_backtest.json trades_backtest_fx.json && npm run backtest:gold && cp trades_backtest.json trades_backtest_gold.json && node generate-report-data.js && node build-report.cjs
scripts.start:gold: TRADING_PAIRS=XAU_USD STRATEGY_MODE=ny_asian_continuation SESSION_WINDOW_MODE=all_windows NY_ASIAN_MIN_BREAK_PIPS=100 NY_ASIAN_ENTRY_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_STOP_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_MIN_RISK_PIPS=200 NY_ASIAN_MAX_RISK_PIPS=2000 NY_ASIAN_RR_RATIO=3.0 NY_ASIAN_REQUIRE_H1_ALIGNMENT=false NY_ASIAN_PREFER_AFTER_UTC=12.5 MAX_SPREAD_PIPS=100 node index.js
scripts.monitor:gold: TRADING_PAIRS=XAU_USD STRATEGY_MODE=ny_asian_continuation SESSION_WINDOW_MODE=all_windows NY_ASIAN_MIN_BREAK_PIPS=100 NY_ASIAN_ENTRY_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_STOP_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_MIN_RISK_PIPS=200 NY_ASIAN_MAX_RISK_PIPS=2000 NY_ASIAN_RR_RATIO=3.0 NY_ASIAN_REQUIRE_H1_ALIGNMENT=false NY_ASIAN_PREFER_AFTER_UTC=12.5 MAX_SPREAD_PIPS=100 node index.js
scripts.auto:gold: TRADING_PAIRS=XAU_USD STRATEGY_MODE=ny_asian_continuation SESSION_WINDOW_MODE=all_windows NY_ASIAN_MIN_BREAK_PIPS=100 NY_ASIAN_ENTRY_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_STOP_BUFFER_PIPS=10 NY_ASIAN_MIN_RISK_PIPS=200 NY_ASIAN_MAX_RISK_PIPS=2000 NY_ASIAN_RR_RATIO=3.0 NY_ASIAN_REQUIRE_H1_ALIGNMENT=false NY_ASIAN_PREFER_AFTER_UTC=12.5 MAX_SPREAD_PIPS=100 node index.js --auto-execute
